title: Tameable Ocelots
description: A mod that makes ocelots tameable
body:
### Taming ocelots was never easier than that!

 
You may be wonder why we needed tameable ocelots?

It changes how the game works with ocelots cause it seems bland and boring to only breed ocelots nowadays.

 
## How do you tame one you may ask?
The first way, default:

1. Find two ocelots anywhere.

2. Breed them with either cod or salmon.

3. Now you have a little child ocelot that will fully trust you even after becoming adult.

 
## The second way, available through config screen:

1. Find a ocelot anywhere.

2. Feed it with either cod or salmon.

3. Congrats, now you have a tamed ocelot!

 
NOTE: This also features a configurable method to convert ocelots to tamed cats once you tame them with either cod or salmon

 
FAQ:

    Q: Will it work with any ocelot-related mod?
    A: I want to believe it will, but it can only be figured out by testing.
    Q: I have some issues with the mod!
    A: Write an issue on my Github repo, please. I'll try to help you if I can.
